view.title: Validate persona scenario #3

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 3 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of running a consolidated report for multiple clients, but the evidence provided does not include specific API interactions or results that confirm the scenario behavior. While the expected result states that the scenario behavior should be confirmed or produce a failure report, there are no concrete traces or snapshots captured to support this validation. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive outcome for this exploratory step.
